'''鈭歯-r-dh-ch''' ('''kanardhechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:isogenize|isogenize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-r-dh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:isogenize|isogenize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-r-dh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kanardhechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinardhechoko|thinardhechoko]] || [[word:jinardhechoko|jinardhechoko]] || [[word:shinardhechoko|shinardhechoko]] || [[word:kinardhechoko|kinardhechoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
